problem: What is the actual neurobiological mechanism of depression — serotonin alone is insufficient
mechanism: Deep brain stimulation of subthalamic nucleus
hypothesis: Deep brain stimulation of subthalamic nucleus may resolve What is the actual neurobiological mechanism of depression — serotonin alone is insufficient by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Longitudinal patient cohort with 20 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
